package.name: navigation
package.description:
Minimal point-to-point navigator for the G1 Onboard.
Per the 2026-05-14 spec change, the demo environment is fixed and obstacle-free, so the full Nav2 stack (map_server / amcl / planner_server / controller_server / bt_navigator) was removed. This package now ships a single goto_node that: - subscribes to the UWB absolute pose from sensors/uwb_node, - accepts target poses on /onboard/cmd/nav_goal (PoseStamped only — named-goal resolution is owned by the PC side per the 2026-05-15 comm_bridge review), - emits cmd_vel toward the target (P-controller) until within tolerance, - reports nav state on /onboard/nav/state (kist_drl_g1_msgs/NavState).
The cmd_vel still flows through safety_monitor before reaching motor_controller.
